title: edit-media
summary:
Link relation type "edit-media": Refers to a resource that can be used to edit media
      associated with the link's context. Defined in RFC5023.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

Refers to a resource that can be used to edit media
